creator: petr.fischer@me.com
text:
Black screen, error after start:
-----
error: could not load plugin /usr/local/lib/zathura/djvu.so (/usr/local/lib/zathura/djvu.so: Undefined symbol "zathura_plugin_set_register_functions_function")
error: could not load plugin /usr/local/lib/zathura/ps.so (/usr/local/lib/zathura/ps.so: Undefined symbol "zathura_plugin_set_register_functions_function")
error: could not load plugin /usr/local/lib/zathura/pdf.so (/usr/local/lib/zathura/pdf.so: Undefined symbol "zathura_plugin_set_register_functions_function")
-----

$ pkg info | grep zathu | cut -d" " -f1
girara-0.2.8_1
zathura-0.3.8
zathura-djvu-0.2.6_3
zathura-pdf-poppler-0.2.7_4
zathura-ps-0.2.4_3

-----

$ freebsd-version -ku
11.1-RELEASE-p4
11.1-RELEASE-p6
